title: Willow Bariatric Chair
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.dimensions: WL1401 (with arms): 30"W x 27"D x 34"H overall; seat 26"W x 18"D x 18.5"H; arm height 26"H | WL1402 (armless): 26"W x 27"D x 34"H overall | WL1801 (with arms, wide seat): 30"W x 27"D x 34"H overall; seat 30"W x 18"D x 18.5"H; arm height 26"H | WL1802 (armless, wide seat): 26"W x 27"D x 34"H overall; seat 30"W x 18"D x 18.5"H
specs.materials: Steel frame with oval legs; fully upholstered seat and back with soy-based foam; Matrex seat support system; fabric or healthcare vinyl upholstery; water-based adhesives
finishes_available: 9 powder coat leg finish options (colours configurable via LesroCreate)
key_features: Matrex seat support system for long-life comfort
Fully upholstered seat, back, and arms (WL1401/WL1801)
Over 200 fabric and healthcare vinyl upholstery options
Oval steel legs with durable powder coat finish or optional chrome
Easy assembly with Lesro interlocking hardware
Modular system for flexible reception/lounge layouts
specs.warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on frame and assemblies; 2 years on upholstery
specs.notes: Manufacturer is Lesro Industries, not a brand carried by Global Furniture Group or OTG — BBI should verify this is intentionally in their catalog. The Willow line includes four bariatric SKUs: WL1401 (with arms, standard seat width) and WL1402 (armless), plus the wider-seat WL1801 (with arms) and WL1802 (armless). Spec data sourced from authorized dealer pages and lesro.com; no specific BIFMA certification found for the Willow line. The lesro.com LesroCreate configurator page (WL1401) exists but renders dynamically and does not expose structured spec data. Confidence rated medium as no manufacturer spec sheet PDF was directly loaded.
